name: projection_filter
sql: SELECT id, value FROM axon_table WHERE category = 'B' ORDER BY id

name: aggregate_sum
sql: SELECT SUM(value) AS total_value FROM axon_table

name: group_by_category
sql: SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS row_count FROM axon_table GROUP BY category ORDER BY category

name: order_limit
sql: SELECT id FROM axon_table ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 2
